allocationTarget.publicAllocationDescription: Target allocation for public circulation, ecosystem, community, liquidity, and future public distribution. It should not be described as fully circulating unless on-chain distribution proves it and the relevant data platform accepts it.
allocationTarget.ownerReserveCustodyNote: Normal owner-controlled wallet; not locked, vested, or multisig-controlled.

dataPlatformReporting.circulatingSupplyAcceptance: Each data platform decides whether and how to treat owner-held reserve balances. GCA should not claim an accepted circulating supply until the specific platform publishes it.
dataPlatformReporting.whyExplorersShowOneBillion: Block explorers read ERC-20 totalSupply. Moving tokens into a reserve wallet or liquidity pool does not reduce totalSupply.
dataPlatformReporting.ifAskedForLockedReserve: The current reserve is not locked. Stronger reserve assurance would require an on-chain custody change such as a published Safe multisig, lock, or vesting contract.

safeClaims: GCA total supply is fixed at 1,000,000,000 GCA.
GCA has no post-deployment mint function.
The current public allocation target is 400,000,000 GCA.
The disclosed owner-held reserve target is 600,000,000 GCA.
The owner reserve wallet and reserve transfer transaction hashes are public.
doNotClaim: 400,000,000 GCA is fully circulating unless on-chain distribution proves it and the relevant data platform accepts it
the 600,000,000 GCA reserve is locked, vested, or multisig-controlled before an on-chain custody change
the reserve provides price support, redemption rights, yield, or liquidity backing
a data platform has accepted a circulating supply figure before publication
